Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

Class EmbedResourceImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec.AbstractResource
        • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl.EmbedResourceImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EmbedResource
    public class EmbedResourceImpl
extends AbstractResource
implements EmbedResource
    Implementation of the EmbedResource interface for interacting with the embedding resource of the Gemini API. This class provides methods for generating embeddings for text and other types of content.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec.AbstractResource

        geminiClient, modelTool

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      EmbedResourceImpl​(GeminiClient geminiClient, JsonService jsonService)
      Constructs a new EmbedResourceImpl with the required GeminiClient and JsonService.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      BatchEmbedContentsResponse batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
      Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
      BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder batchEmbedContentsBuilder​(List<String> texts)
      Creates a new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance to build a BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder for generating embeddings for the given list of texts.
      EmbedContentResponse embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
      Generates an embedding for the given content.
      EmbedContentRequestBuilder embedContentBuilder​(String text)
      Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.
      GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
      Returns the associated GeminiClient.

    • Constructor Detail

      • EmbedResourceImpl

        public EmbedResourceImpl​(GeminiClient geminiClient,
                         JsonService jsonService)
        Constructs a new EmbedResourceImpl with the required GeminiClient and JsonService.
        Parameters:
        geminiClient - The GeminiClient instance to use for API communication.
        jsonService - The JsonService instance to use for JSON serialization/deserialization.

    • Method Detail

      • getGeminiClient

        public GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
        Returns the associated GeminiClient.
        Specified by:
        getGeminiClient in interface EmbedResource
        Returns:
        The GeminiClient instance.

      • embedContent

        public EmbedContentResponse embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
                                  throws GeminiApiException,
                                         JsonException,
                                         HttpException
        Generates an embedding for the given content.
        Specified by:
        embedContent in interface EmbedResource
        Parameters:
        request - The EmbedContentRequest containing the content to embed and other parameters.
        Returns:
        An EmbedContentResponse containing the generated embedding.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the embedding generation process.
        JsonException - If an error occurs during JSON processing.
        HttpException - If an error occurs during the HTTP request.

      • batchEmbedContent

        public BatchEmbedContentsResponse batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
                                             throws GeminiApiException,
                                                    JsonException,
                                                    HttpException
        Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
        Specified by:
        batchEmbedContent in interface EmbedResource
        Parameters:
        request - The BatchEmbedContentsRequest containing a list of EmbedContentRequest objects.
        Returns:
        A BatchEmbedContentsResponse containing a list of generated embeddings.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the batch embedding generation process.
        JsonException - If an error occurs during JSON processing.
        HttpException - If an error occurs during the HTTP request.

      • embedContentBuilder

        public EmbedContentRequestBuilder embedContentBuilder​(String text)
        Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.
        Specified by:
        embedContentBuilder in interface EmbedResource
        Parameters:
        text - The text to embed.
        Returns:
        A new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance.

      • batchEmbedContentsBuilder

        public BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder batchEmbedContentsBuilder​(List<String> texts)
        Creates a new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance to build a BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder for generating embeddings for the given list of texts.
        Specified by:
        batchEmbedContentsBuilder in interface EmbedResource
        Parameters:
        texts - The list of texts to embed.
        Returns:
        A new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance.
